description_long: This object is a dome-shaped sculpture featuring a highly realistic panoramic image of a Parisian street scene, wrapped seamlessly around its curved surface. The image depicts classic Haussmann-style buildings with ornate balconies, large windows, and ground-level storefronts, including a black-framed shop and a red storefront. The photographic print is slightly distorted due to the curvature, creating a fisheye lens effect that immerses the viewer in the urban environment. The surface appears glossy and smooth, reflecting light and enhancing the photographic detail. The sculpture is solid and substantial, with no visible openings or interactive elements. Its overall appearance is strikingly modern, blending urban photography with sculptural form.
description: A glossy, dome-shaped sculpture wrapped in a panoramic photographic print of a Parisian street, featuring Haussmann-style buildings and storefronts. The surface is smooth and reflective, with a fisheye effect.
description_view_0: This view shows the dome with a focus on a beige stone building with black-framed windows and a ground-level storefront, partially obscured by the curvature.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the central courtyard perspective, with tall buildings on both sides and a red storefront visible to the right.
description_view_2: This side presents another section of the street, with a black-framed shopfront and more uniform beige stonework, less architectural detail than other views.
description_view_3: This view centers on the ornate façade of a Haussmann building, with symmetrical windows and decorative stonework, and a glimpse of palm plants at the base.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture appears to be situated in an urban environment, possibly displayed outdoors or in a public plaza, as suggested by the cityscape imagery.
